summary: Normalized BreezeDoc base URL/base path handling so saved configs do not double-prefix /api.
reason: The printed CLI could persist base_url=https://breezedoc.com/api with base_path=/api, which caused live requests to hit /api/api/*.
validated_outcome: doctor --json reported credentials valid and live client-workspace-snapshot returned account counts from https://breezedoc.com/api/*.
